title: Implement Factory Method Injection in "@Configuration" classes
description: Avoid early initialization of beans and optimize the way the Spring context loads by using Factory Method Injection in "@Configuration" classes.
recommendation: Use Factory Method Injection instead of field injection for dependencies in "@Configuration" classes.
impact: Improves code quality and security by avoiding early initialization of beans.

checks.message: Use Factory Method Injection instead of field injection for dependencies in "@Configuration" classes.
